title: Hieracium tanythrix
intro: Hieracium tanythrix, also known as Hawkweed, is a perennial plant species within the dandelion-like Asteraceae family. It has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, particularly in treating fever, rheumatism, and digestive issues due to its anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties. The bioactive constituents of Hieracium tanythrix include sesquiterpene lactones, flavonoids, and phenolic acids, which contribute to its therapeutic effects. Hieracium tanythrix is commonly prepared as a tea, tincture, or infusion, which are used in traditional folk medicine to alleviate various health conditions.
